description: Two receipts with receipt_id 'dup-001'. Pack is otherwise valid-shaped and re-signed.
mutation: receipt_pack.jsonl: two receipts share receipt_id 'dup-001'. Manifest updated and re-signed.

root_cause.note: The pack verifier detects duplicate receipt_ids via verify_receipt_pack, which sets passed=False. The pack-level error surfaces as receipt_integrity mismatch (attestation claims PASS but recomputed is FAIL). E_DUPLICATE_ID is not directly propagated to the pack result.

note: The duplicate receipt_id is the root cause, but the pack verifier reports it as a receipt_integrity mismatch. File hashes, signature, attestation hash, and D12 all pass independently.
conformance_requirement: A conforming verifier MUST report passed=false. The specific error may be E_MANIFEST_TAMPER on receipt_integrity (pack-level) or E_DUPLICATE_ID (receipt-level). Both are valid conforming behaviors.
